sentences.arabic: بَنَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَدْرَسَةً جَدِيدَةً فِي الْحَيِّ الشَّمَالِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Grad je sagradio novu školu u sjevernoj četvrti.
sentences.translationEn: The city has built a new school in the northern district.

sentences.arabic: تَضُمُّ الْمَدْرَسَةُ عِشْرِينَ فَصْلًا دِرَاسِيًّا وَمَكْتَبَةً كَبِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Škola ima dvadeset učionica i veliku biblioteku.
sentences.translationEn: The school has twenty classrooms and a large library.

sentences.arabic: سَيَدْرُسُ فِيهَا أَكْثَرُ مِنْ خَمْسِمِائَةِ طَالِبٍ وَطَالِبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: U njoj će učiti više od petsto učenika i učenica.
sentences.translationEn: More than five hundred students will study there.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ مَسْؤُولُ التَّعْلِيمِ إِنَّ الْمَدْرَسَةَ سَتَفْتَحُ أَبْوَابَهَا فِي بِدَايَةِ الْعَامِ الدِّرَاسِيِّ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Zvaničnik za obrazovanje rekao je da će škola otvoriti svoja vrata na početku naredne školske godine.
sentences.translationEn: The education official said that the school will open its doors at the beginning of next academic year.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ أَهَالِي الْحَيِّ بِالسَّعَادَةِ لِأَنَّ أَطْفَالَهُمْ لَنْ يُسَافِرُوا بَعِيدًا لِلدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici četvrti su sretni jer njihova djeca neće morati putovati daleko kako bi išla u školu.
sentences.translationEn: Residents of the district are happy because their children will not have to travel far to attend school.
